theme_and_archetype.description: A modern, professional admin dashboard for a school ERP. Needs to balance high data density (fintech style) with approachability (education). Uses clean lines, crisp typography, and high contrast for legibility.

headings.description: Used for page titles, KPI numbers, and major section headers.

body.description: Crisp and legible for data tables, forms, and general UI text.

primary.description: Indigo-600. Professional, trustworthy, slightly vibrant for primary actions.

background.description: Slate-50 for app background, pure White for cards/surfaces.

neutral.description: Slate-900 for primary text, Slate-500 for muted.

spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-64 fixed h-full bg-white border-r border-slate-200 z-40. Use flex-col, space-y-1 for nav items. Active state: bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 font-medium.
spacing_and_layout.kpi_cards: col-span-1 p-6 bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
spacing_and_layout.chart_containers: col-span-2 lg:col-span-2 bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-6 shadow-sm
spacing_and_layout.lists_and_tables: col-span-full xl:col-span-3 bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden

cards.style: Flat with 1px border (#E2E8F0), soft shadow (shadow-sm), rounded-xl. Hover state adds slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and shadow-md.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-300 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.destructive: bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 hover:bg-red-600 transition-colors shadow-sm

inputs.style: rounded-lg border-slate-300 shadow-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-indigo-500 sm:text-sm

status_badges.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold border-b border-slate-200 px-6 py-3
tables.rows: bg-white border-b border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors text-sm text-slate-700 px-6 py-4

login_background.description: Abstract 3D geometric background in soft blue and white for the auth/login screen.

empty_state_icon.description: 3D academic graduation cap for empty states (no students, no classes, etc.).

school_exterior.description: Modern school building for dashboard welcome card or institute profile.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 ratio minimum.
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: All interactive elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-2.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive and key informational elements. Use kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='student-save-button', data-testid='kpi-total-students-value').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize the project with React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI. Choose javascript for the project (.js files).
2. Configure Tailwind with the color palette (Indigo/Slate) and fonts (Cabinet Grotesk / IBM Plex Sans). Note: Include these fonts in index.html via Google Fonts or Fontshare.
3. Build the primary Layout component: A fixed 64 (w-64) sidebar on the left and main content area on the right.
4. For KPI Cards (Total Students, Teachers, Fees, Attendance), use the 'Control Room' grid layout.
5. For data tables (Students, Employees, Fees), use a clean, border-collapse style with text-xs uppercase headers and soft row hovers.
6. Do NOT use standard Shadcn card styles blindly; customize them to be rounded-xl with shadow-sm and 1px border-slate-200 to match the Soft Utility theme.
7. Implement all the forms (Add Student, Add Class, Settings) using Shadcn Form/Input/Select components, keeping them dense and professional.
8. Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) or Lucide (lucide-react) for consistent dashboard iconography.
9. CRITICAL: Inject data-testid on every button, link, form input, and table row for automated testing.
10. Only use images provided in the 'media' object for placeholders and backgrounds. No generic dummy images.
